event: Admitted for treatment of acute pulmonary embolism
Blood cultures positive for Gram positive cocci in pairs and clusters
Administered Ciprofloxacin for urinary tract infection
Physical examination did not yield any abnormalities
VQ scan indicated high probability for pulmonary emboli
Chest x ray showed possible development of small bilateral pleural effusions
Multiple nodular opacities scattered throughout the lungs
CT scan of the abdomen showed moderate alveolar consolidation in the right lower lobe
No indication that the patient recently visited a farm or had contact with goats
No indication of risk factors associated with S. caprae infection
